message:
Command `cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

# Test default and contention with longer timeout
RESULT=$(timeout 50 /tmp/test_default.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY|timeout" | tail -3)
echo "DEFAULT: ${RESULT}"

# Contention test may take longer
RESULT=$(timeout 50 /tmp/test_contention.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY|CONTENTION_SUMMARY|timeout" | tail -5)
echo "CONTENTION: ${RESULT}"` executed with exit code 0.
